scan.title: Redeem Prescription
scan.instruction: Hold your insurance card near your phone
scan.subtitle: Place your eGK (elektronische Gesundheitskarte) on the back of your device
scan.error: Card not recognized. Please try again.

list.title: Your Prescriptions
list.noResults: No prescriptions found for your insurance card.

delivery.title: Delivery Method
delivery.instruction: How would you like to receive your medication?
delivery.homeDeliveryDesc: Delivered to your address within 1–3 business days
delivery.apothekePickupDesc: Pick up at a nearby APO group Apotheke — often same day

confirmation.title: Review & Confirm
confirmation.consent: I confirm that I am authorized to redeem these prescriptions
confirmation.successPickup: Your medication will be ready for pickup at {{location}}.
confirmation.successDelivery: Your medication will be delivered to {{address}} within 1–3 business days.
